mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.bookmark_count, p.like_count, p.generate_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at, COALESCE(ts.weekly_score, 0) AS weekly_score FROM prompts p LEFT JOIN v_trending_scores ts ON ts.prompt_id = p.id WHERE p.visibility = 'public' AND p.is_deleted = false ORDER BY COALESCE(ts.weekly_score, 0) DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, title, description, tags, bookmark_count, like_count, generate_count, created_at FROM prompts WHERE visibility = 'public' AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, title, description, tags, bookmark_count, like_count, generate_count, created_at FROM prompts WHERE visibility = 'public' AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, title, description, tags, bookmark_count, like_count, generate_count, created_at FROM prompts WHERE visibility = 'public' AND is_deleted = false
AND (title ILIKE '%' || #{q} || '%')
AND #{tag} = ANY(tags)
ORDER BY created_at DESC ORDER BY bookmark_count DESC, like_count DESC ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prompts WHERE visibility = 'public' AND is_deleted = false
AND (title ILIKE '%' || #{q} || '%')
AND #{tag} = ANY(tags)

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.visibility, p.current_version_id, p.bookmark_count, p.like_count, p.generate_count, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at, pv.id AS version_id, pv.template_body, pv.version_number FROM prompts p LEFT JOIN prompt_versions pv ON pv.id = p.current_version_id WHERE p.id = #{id}::uuid AND p.visibility = 'public' AND p.is_deleted = false
SELECT id, key, label, type, required, placeholder, help_text, default_value, options, sort_order FROM prompt_variables WHERE version_id = #{versionId}::uuid ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prompts (id, user_id, title, description, tags, visibility) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), #{userId}::uuid, #{title}, #{description}, #{tags,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.ArrayTypeHandler}::text[], 'draft')
mapper.update: UPDATE prompts SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND user_id = #{userId}::uuid
UPDATE prompts SET generate_count = generate_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
